sections.name: Anoreth Zorillen
sections.text: *Nethys Note: No description has been provided for this NPC.*

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Human
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the human ancestry. Humans are a diverse array of people known for their adaptability. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by humans.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

sources.name: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun

link.name: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun pg. 30
link.alt: Pathfinder #215: To Blot Out the Sun pg. 30

gear.name: pocket watch containing a lock of black hair tied in a pink ribbon

traits.name: Arcane
traits.text:
This magic comes from the arcane tradition, which is built on logic and rationality. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to arcane magic.

automatic_abilities.name: Requirements
automatic_abilities.effect: Anoreth expends magical energy stored in their bonded item. During the current turn, they can cast one spell they prepared today and already cast, without spending a spell slot. They must still Cast the Spell and meet the spell's other requirements.
automatic_abilities.text: Anoreth's bonded item is on their person;

automatic_abilities.name: Scrap Ward
automatic_abilities.trigger: A construct within 60 feet of Anoreth is damaged
automatic_abilities.effect: Anoreth clenches their fist, magically seizing the raw materials damaged by the triggering Strike and drawing it toward themself. These materials orbit Anoreth in a defensive ward, granting them 10 Temporary Hit points until the end of their next turn.

automatic_abilities.name: Steady Spellcasting
automatic_abilities.text: If a reaction would disrupt Anoreth's spellcasting action, they attempt a DC 15 flat check; if they succeed, their action isn't disrupted.

traits.name: Two-Hand
traits.text: This weapon can be wielded with two hands to change its weapon damage die to the indicated value. This change applies to all the weapon’s damage dice.

ability.name: Familiar
ability.text: Anoreth's familiar is a pipefox named Kiriki, who is usually in area D5. Kiriki has a Speed of 25 feet, climb Speed of 20 feet, darkvision, and the independent familiar ability. She otherwise functions as a pipefox.

ability.name: Reach Spell
ability.text: Anoreth extends their spells' range. If the next action they use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase the spell's range by 30 feet.

ability.name: Recall Kiriki

traits.name: Arcane
traits.text:
This magic comes from the arcane tradition, which is built on logic and rationality. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to arcane magic.

traits.name: Teleportation
traits.text: Teleportation effects instantaneously move something from one point in space to another. Teleportation does not usually trigger reactions based on movement.

ability.text: Anoreth calls out Kiriki's name and snaps their fingers, causing their pipefox familiar (and up to 1 Bulk of objects carried by Kiriki) to instantly transport to an adjacent square of Anoreth's choice, provided Kiriki is within 1 mile.
